text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yo, Prez! Guess what? Turns out today's Father's
Day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sooo, you're gonna be my dad for the day!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to be your dad? I can't even begin to
imagine what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to! Look, if you were my dad, how
would you raise me?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hm, how would I raise you... Well, I wouldn't use
any specific methods, I think.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would raise you with love and watch you grow.
The same way I treat any other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
True impartiality. I would treat my child like any
other, so that they in turn treat others equally.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so you wouldn't pick favorites? My dad
rocks!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Come now, I'm not your dad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (The president's doing that for Teio...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (I could do that too, maybe.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ryan. Today's Father's Day... So you're my
dad, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What?! What do you mean, "right?"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You don't... want to be my dad?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, okay. I'll be your dad. Ever since we were
little, you've always come up with these weird
games outta nowhere...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: So, if you were my dad, how would you raise me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How would I raise you? We'd play soccer,
basketball, and catchball together, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Only sports.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I-I don't know what else to say... I don't
have a clue how to be a dad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'd stick to it until you got bored, then I'd do
my best to play whatever other game you wanted!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me of when we were little, you
would do just that whenever my parents weren't
around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Ryan. I guess.. you really are my dad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Nope. This dad thing is only for today, got it?
